title: Karpatiosorbus badensis
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus badensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It belongs to the genus Karpatiosorbus, which is a group of deciduous shrubs or small trees. The family Rosaceae includes a wide range of plants, including roses, apples, and pears. Karpatiosorbus badensis is native to Europe and is often found in mountainous regions. The classification of Karpatiosorbus badensis reflects its botanical relationships and evolutionary history.
